summary: C3: review_edges.py — extract accept_edge / reject_edge / reclassify_edge helpers with DELETE-retraction discipline + tests. Mirror of review_tags's editorial overlay.

resolution.note: Three editorial-overlay helpers (accept_edge, reject_edge, reclassify_edge) extracted from review_edges.py inline loop. DELETE-retraction discipline lands on reject + reclassify-old-type. surface_only/unrelated reclassify routes through typed reject (per edges.md §4 fix to the prior CLI bug where reclassify-to-surface_only would CHECK-fail at promote). 10 unit tests cover all branches; full suite 102/102 + parity green.
